'''Chryya''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] with a thriving [[Spice/Legends|spice]] business. It was located in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]], on the [[Hydian Way/Legends|Hydian Way]] near the border of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="TEA" /> [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]] was once sent on a mission to this planet by [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]] to convince the [[Miner/Legends|miners]] to sell to the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]]. Maul's failure to convince them was his only failure prior to the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]].<ref name="Journal: Darth Maul">''[[Star Wars Journal: Darth Maul]]''</ref>
